zh.lifeSummary: 當William Farington II於1415年出生在英國藍卡爾法利頓時，他的父親William Farrington I34歲，母親Alice Elizabeth Lacey27歲。他於1431年與Margaret Hallowell在英國結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1456年在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Farington II于1415年出生在英国藍卡爾法利頓时，他的父亲William Farrington I34岁，母亲Alice Elizabeth Lacey27岁。他于1431年与Margaret Hallowell在英国结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1456年在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Farington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Farrington
meanings: English: habitational name from Farrington in Lancashire, but perhaps occasionally from Farrington Gurney in Somerset. Both are named from Old English fearn ‘fern’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The surname also probably reached America via Ireland, where it is recorded as early as the 14th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Farington II was born in 1415, in Farington, Lancashire, England, his father, William Farrington I, was 34 and his mother, Alice Elizabeth Lacey, was 27. He married Margaret Hallowell in 1431, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died about 1456, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Farington II est né en 1415, à Farington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Farrington I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Elizabeth Lacey, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hallowell en 1431, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1456, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Farington II 1415 in Farington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Farrington I 34 und seine Mutter Alice Elizabeth Lacey 27. Er hat 1431 in England Margaret Hallowell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1456 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Farington II è nato il nel 1415 nel Farington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Farrington I, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice Elizabeth Lacey, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Hallowell nel 1431, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì circa 1456, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Farington IIが1415年にイギリスランカシュアイアファリントンで生まれた時，父William Farrington Iは34歳，母Alice Elizabeth Laceyは27歳であった。1431年にイギリスでMargaret Hallowellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1456年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Farington II(이)가 1415년 영국 랭카실르 패링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Farrington I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Elizabeth Lacey(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1431년 영국에서 Margaret Hallowell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1456년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Farington II nasceu em 1415, em Farington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Farrington I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Elizabeth Lacey, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hallowell em 1431, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1456, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Farington II родился в 1415 г. в местности фарингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Farrington I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Elizabeth Lacey, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hallowell в 1431 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер около 1456 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Farington II nació en 1415, en Farington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Farrington I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Elizabeth Lacey, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Hallowell en 1431, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1456, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
